{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929","messages":[{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"What is the capital of France?"}],"role":"user"}],"system":[{"type":"text","text":"[cache buster: springai-anthropic vcr-mode]
Reference material (stable, cached with a 1 hour TTL):

The following is a condensed atlas of capital cities. It does
not change between requests within a session, which is why it
is cached with the longer 1 hour TTL. Consult it before
answering.

Europe:
  - France: Paris
  - Germany: Berlin
  - Italy: Rome
  - Spain: Madrid
  - Portugal: Lisbon
  - United Kingdom: London
  - Ireland: Dublin
  - Netherlands: Amsterdam (seat of government: The Hague)
  - Belgium: Brussels
  - Luxembourg: Luxembourg City
  - Switzerland: Bern (de facto; no de jure capital)
  - Austria: Vienna
  - Denmark: Copenhagen
  - Sweden: Stockholm
  - Norway: Oslo
  - Finland: Helsinki
  - Iceland: Reykjavik
  - Poland: Warsaw
  - Czechia: Prague
  - Slovakia: Bratislava
  - Hungary: Budapest
  - Romania: Bucharest
  - Bulgaria: Sofia
  - Greece: Athens
  - Ukraine: Kyiv
  - Belarus: Minsk
  - Russia: Moscow
  - Serbia: Belgrade
  - Croatia: Zagreb
  - Slovenia: Ljubljana
  - Bosnia and Herzegovina: Sarajevo
  - North Macedonia: Skopje
  - Albania: Tirana
  - Montenegro: Podgorica
  - Estonia: Tallinn
  - Latvia: Riga
  - Lithuania: Vilnius
  - Moldova: Chisinau
  - Malta: Valletta

Asia:
  - Japan: Tokyo
  - China: Beijing
  - South Korea: Seoul
  - North Korea: Pyongyang
  - Mongolia: Ulaanbaatar
  - Vietnam: Hanoi
  - Thailand: Bangkok
  - Cambodia: Phnom Penh
  - Laos: Vientiane
  - Myanmar: Naypyidaw
  - Malaysia: Kuala Lumpur
  - Singapore: Singapore
  - Indonesia: Jakarta (moving to Nusantara)
  - Philippines: Manila
  - India: New Delhi
  - Pakistan: Islamabad
  - Bangladesh: Dhaka
  - Sri Lanka: Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte (commercial: Colombo)
  - Nepal: Kathmandu
  - Bhutan: Thimphu
  - Afghanistan: Kabul
  - Iran: Tehran
  - Iraq: Baghdad
  - Saudi Arabia: Riyadh
  - Yemen: Sanaa
  - Oman: Muscat
  - United Arab Emirates: Abu Dhabi
  - Qatar: Doha
  - Bahrain: Manama
  - Kuwait: Kuwait City
  - Jordan: Amman
  - Lebanon: Beirut
  - Syria: Damascus
  - Israel: Jerusalem (recognition varies)
  - Turkey: Ankara
  - Armenia: Yerevan
  - Azerbaijan: Baku
  - Georgia: Tbilisi
  - Kazakhstan: Astana
  - Uzbekistan: Tashkent
  - Turkmenistan: Ashgabat
  - Kyrgyzstan: Bishkek
  - Tajikistan: Dushanbe

Africa:
  - Egypt: Cairo
  - Libya: Tripoli
  - Tunisia: Tunis
  - Algeria: Algiers
  - Morocco: Rabat
  - Sudan: Khartoum
  - South Sudan: Juba
  - Ethiopia: Addis Ababa
  - Eritrea: Asmara
  - Somalia: Mogadishu
  - Djibouti: Djibouti
  - Kenya: Nairobi
  - Uganda: Kampala
  - Rwanda: Kigali
  - Burundi: Gitega
  - Tanzania: Dodoma
  - Nigeria: Abuja
  - Ghana: Accra
  - Ivory Coast: Yamoussoukro (de facto: Abidjan)
  - Senegal: Dakar
  - Mali: Bamako
  - Cameroon: Yaounde
  - South Africa: Pretoria (executive), Cape Town (legislative), Bloemfontein (judicial)
  - Zimbabwe: Harare
  - Zambia: Lusaka
  - Angola: Luanda
  - Mozambique: Maputo
  - Madagascar: Antananarivo
  - Namibia: Windhoek
  - Botswana: Gaborone
  - Democratic Republic of the Congo: Kinshasa
  - Republic of the Congo: Brazzaville

Americas:
  - United States: Washington, D.C.
  - Canada: Ottawa
  - Mexico: Mexico City
  - Guatemala: Guatemala City
  - Belize: Belmopan
  - Honduras: Tegucigalpa
  - El Salvador: San Salvador
  - Nicaragua: Managua
  - Costa Rica: San Jose
  - Panama: Panama City
  - Cuba: Havana
  - Jamaica: Kingston
  - Haiti: Port-au-Prince
  - Dominican Republic: Santo Domingo
  - Colombia: Bogota
  - Venezuela: Caracas
  - Ecuador: Quito
  - Peru: Lima
  - Bolivia: Sucre (constitutional), La Paz (seat of government)
  - Chile: Santiago
  - Argentina: Buenos Aires
  - Uruguay: Montevideo
  - Paraguay: Asuncion
  - Brazil: Brasilia

Oceania:
  - Australia: Canberra
  - New Zealand: Wellington
  - Fiji: Suva
  - Papua New Guinea: Port Moresby
  - Samoa: Apia
  - Tonga: Nuku'alofa
  - Vanuatu: Port Vila
  - Solomon Islands: Honiara
  - Micronesia: Palikir
  - Palau: Ngerulmud
  - Marshall Islands: Majuro
  - Kiribati: South Tarawa
  - Nauru: no official capital; government in Yaren District
  - Tuvalu: Funafuti

Notes on multi-capital and disputed cases:

  - Netherlands: the constitutional capital is Amsterdam but
    the seat of government, parliament, and supreme court are
    all in The Hague. Prefer Amsterdam unless the user asks
    about the government specifically.
  - South Africa: three capitals split by branch. Pretoria
    hosts the executive, Cape Town hosts parliament, and
    Bloemfontein hosts the supreme court of appeal. No single
    city is "the" capital.
  - Bolivia: Sucre is the constitutional capital, but La Paz
    is the seat of government and the larger city. Either
    answer is defensible; list both when asked.
  - Ivory Coast: Yamoussoukro has been the official capital
    since 1983, but Abidjan remains the economic hub and de
    facto administrative center for most purposes.
  - Sri Lanka: Sri Jayawardenepura Kotte is the legislative
    capital. Colombo is the commercial capital and by far the
    more commonly referenced city.
  - Switzerland: Bern is the de facto capital (the seat of
    the federal authorities), but Swiss law does not
    designate any city as "the capital".
  - Nauru: has no designated capital. Government offices are
    in the Yaren District, which is often listed as the
    capital by convention.
  - Israel: Jerusalem is the declared capital, but
    international recognition of that status is not
    universal. Many embassies are in Tel Aviv.
  - Palestine: de jure capital is East Jerusalem; de facto
    administrative center is Ramallah. Both appear in
    official usage.
  - Taiwan: Taipei is the capital of the Republic of China.
    Recognition as a sovereign state varies by country.
  - Kosovo: Pristina is the capital of the Republic of
    Kosovo. Recognition as a sovereign state varies by
    country.
  - Somaliland: Hargeisa is the capital of the self-declared
    Republic of Somaliland, which is not widely recognized.
    Somalia, which claims the territory, has its capital at
    Mogadishu.

End of reference material.
